items.title: AI Governance Watch: Nineteen New AI Bills Passed Into Law
items.summary: Since mid-March 2026, 19 additional AI bills have passed into law across US states, bringing the total to 25 in 2026, covering areas like AI use restrictions, elections, government, and healthcare. Another 27 bills have passed both chambers and await final approval.
items.domain_relevance: AI regulatory developments: tracks new state AI laws passed

items.title: White House AI Framework Signals New Compliance Stakes
items.summary: On March 20, 2026, the Trump Administration released the National Policy Framework for AI, calling for federal preemption of state AI laws, regulatory sandboxes, and measures against censorship while advancing federal AI standards.
items.domain_relevance: AI regulatory developments: new federal AI policy framework

items.title: 2026 AI Laws Update: Key Regulations and Practical Guidance
items.summary: Overview of 2026 AI laws including Trump's December 2025 EO directing FCC and FTC to develop federal AI standards preempting state laws, with exclusions for child safety and infrastructure, impacting frontier AI developers.
items.domain_relevance: AI regulatory developments: federal preemption and agency actions
